items.title: Check whether MOHW specialist social-work training organization applicants need deadline support
items.question: Do any partner-facing social-work training or supervision proposals need a simple application checklist before the new-applicant window closes?

items.title: Watch for reusable SME financial carbon-check education material
items.question: Does FSC, the SME Administration, or a bank publish a guide that can become a plain-language SME education checklist?

items.title: Verify approval-mode alignment in the next Codex automation review
items.question: Do recurring automations still carry prompt-level approval gates that match product approval-mode behavior?

items.title: Convert AI-agent control signals into a local automation checklist
items.question: Which controls should be mandatory before any browser-backed or account-connected automation becomes recurring?

items.title: Sketch one manual reward-loop prototype before building gamification
items.question: Can one weekly challenge plus a visible non-monetary status signal produce repeat participation before any platform work?
